name: Tri-County Financial Group, Inc.
summary: The Company Tri-County Financial Group, Inc. (the Company) is a bank holding company that was incorporated under the laws of the State of Delaware in 1986. The Company conducts a majority of its business through its wholly owned subsidiary, First State Bank (the Bank). As of December 31, 2025, the Company had approximately $1.6 billion in consolidated total assets. The Company and the Bank are headquartered in Mendota, Illinois.
